Caso donde hay mas de una cifra a la izq de la coma
b23 b22   R(22)  R(22)yR(23)   R(23)  
 0   0     b24       b24        b24
 0   1     b24      ¬b24        b24
 1   0     b24      ¬b24       ¬b24
 1   1    ¬b24      ¬b24       ¬b24

110100110000000000011101
111010100011100011110000

caso 1 : 01 --> b24
1100000100001101000010000 10110000111001100110000
7654321098765432109876543 21098765432109876543210

11.00000100001101000010000
43.21098765432109876543210

1.10000010000110100001000->resultado posta

caso2 : 10 --> ¬b24
110100011101000111111101
111010100010001011110111

1011111111100110100110011 00101110011010100011011
7654321098765432109876543 21098765432109876543210

1.01111111110011010011010->resultado posta

caso3 : 00-->b24
110100011101111000110010
110101000110111110111010

1010111000100111100110010 01110110001111001010100
7654321098765432109876543 21098765432109876543210

1.01011100010011110011001->resultado posta

caso4 : 11 --> ¬b24

110100011101111000110010
110101000110111110111100

1010111000100111100110101 10111101101101010111000
7654321098765432109876543 21098765432109876543210

101011100010011110011011->resultado posta
